overview.description: The Invesco DB Agriculture Fund (DBA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DBIQ Diversified Agriculture TR index. The fund tracks an index of 10 agricultural commodity futures contracts. It selects contracts based on the shape of the futures curve to minimize contango. DBA was launched on Jan 5, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
